description: A male coach in a teal ocean-print rash guard floats a young girl in a swim cap and pink goggles using a yellow pool noodle for support. Parents in the background reinforce the 'real-class-in-session' feel.
Same coach lifts the pink-goggled girl vertically out of the pool wall grip, presenting her almost like an 'I did it!' moment. Her triumphant arms-out posture sells the win.
The same ocean-print coach coaches a second student (blurred foreground) while a yellow pool noodle floats beside him. The staging shows the coach managing multiple drills in the same lane.
A smiling male instructor supports a shirtless young boy in orange goggles mid-air in the pool as parents applaud from the lobby window behind him. Pure 'first jump success' energy.
The same boy crashes into the water in a splashing belly-first leap, arms out and mouth wide open in delight, as the coach catches him. A classic 'dynamic action' photo.
A smaller girl in a pink heart swimsuit and goggles leaps off the pool edge into her coach's arms, flying hands-up with surprise. Parents watch from the viewing area behind.
The same coach cradles a girl in a red swim cap and pink goggles, presenting her like a proud graduation moment. The soft smile reads as genuine coaching affection.

A male coach with a young red-haired boy and a pink-suited girl share a moment at the pool wall — the boy pouring water from a small orange cup as part of a 'water play' lesson. A quiet, charming teaching detail.
Same trio continuing the cup-pouring water exercise at the edge, the baby now holding the orange cup. Fits perfectly as content for 'water acclimatization exercises.'

A braided-Black instructor in a teal rash guard laughs with a goggled girl in a purple swim top as they prop themselves against a blue whale float. Another student in a pink cap leans in from the side.
The same braided instructor and purple-suited girl cuddle against a plush blue whale float, the child's cheek pressed into the toy. A sweet 'swim-toy friend' moment.
Instructor and student ride the blue whale float together — the girl learning balance on the plush while the braided instructor supports from the water. Great 'learning by play' imagery.
The braided instructor holds the goggled girl as she straddles the blue whale float, both beaming. A joyful action shot for social media.
The braided instructor laughs as the goggled girl rides the whale float, leaning forward with confidence. A 'riding the wave' moment captured in close detail.
Overhead angle of the same girl and instructor playing with the whale and polka-dot foam float. The variety of swim toys visible sells 'our lessons are never boring.'
Same pair hug the whale float together, the goggled girl smiling contentedly against the plush. It reads like 'my favorite part of swim class.'
Close-up of the instructor and goggled girl leaning on the blue whale float, eye-to-eye. A tender mentor moment.
The goggled girl drapes herself across the whale float while the instructor beams with her. Excellent 'loves lessons' imagery.
The instructor laughs out loud as the girl rides the whale float, both cheeks creasing with delight. A naturally shot 'bonding' moment.
The braided instructor steadies the goggled girl on the whale float as she practices holding her position. Showcases playful-yet-skill-focused teaching.
